vocab.meaning: điều gì đó cực kỳ dễ dàng
vocab.example: I always found Mathematics to be a breeze, whereas my classmates struggled with basic arithmetic.

vocab.meaning: vốn dĩ là bản năng, làm gì đó rất tự nhiên và thành thạo
vocab.example: Drawing has always been second nature to me, so Art was naturally my favorite subject in primary school.

vocab.meaning: có năng khiếu toán học/tính toán
vocab.example: My teachers noticed early on that I had a head for figures, which is why I excelled in Math classes.
Even at a young age, I was always eager to hit the books, especially when it came to History or Science.

vocab.meaning: hỏi ý kiến ai đó (người thông thái) để học hỏi
vocab.example: I used to love picking my teacher's brains about how the solar system worked during our Science periods.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua kỳ thi với điểm số rất cao
vocab.example: Literature was my forte, and I managed to pass every single essay assignment with flying colors.

vocab.meaning: học trò cưng của giáo viên
vocab.example: I suppose I was a bit of a teacher's pet in English class because I was always the first to raise my hand.

vocab.meaning: mải mê suy nghĩ, thả hồn vào điều gì
vocab.example: During Art sessions, I would often get lost in thought while painting landscapes of my imagination.
I had a keen interest in Physical Education from the get-go because I was such an energetic child.

vocab.meaning: hiểu rõ điều gì đó tường tận, làu làu
vocab.example: By the time I was ten, I knew the world map backwards because Geography fascinated me so much.
